channel.title: Ignition on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Ignition on Pi Stack

item.title: Cloud-Init vs Ignition vs Butane: Self-Hosted Server Bootstrapping Guide 2026
item.description: When you spin up a new virtual machine or bare metal server, the first boot is the most critical moment in its lifecycle. The operating system needs users, SSH keys, network configuration, storage mounts, and service definitions before it can do anything useful. Doing all of this manually does not scale past a handful of machines. Server bootstrapping tools solve this problem by automating the entire first-boot configuration process.
